calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT F. COHEN, TEL. NO. 1-800-492-2657 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LESLIE HOLMES OF HOLMES & USOZ LLP, TEL. NO. (408) 292-7600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PARMINDER S. CHAHAL INDIVIDUALLY DBA MONTEREY MINIMART's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant failed to present any evidence, argument, or explanation as to why Plaintiff's service of summons did not conform to the statutory requirements for service of process. Moreover, Defendant plainly had actual knowledge of the action prior to entry of the Default Judgment, and has failed to explain the delay in bringing this Motion. Finally, on the grounds of mistake, inadvertence, surprise and excusable neglect the Motion is untimely. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/EHG

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PARMINDER S. CHAHAL INDIVIDUALLY DBA MONTEREY MINI MART's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS Denied. CCP 473(b) requires that an application to set aside default "shall be accompanied by a copy of the answer or other pleading proposed to be filed therein, otherwise the application shall not be granted." Plaintiff did not attach a responsive pleading to his motion. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
